privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a document template in NOSH ChartingSystem (a real open-source electronic health record system developed by Michael Chen, MD) for the fictional practice 'Hillside Family Medicine'. The template is titled 'New Patient Welcome' and contains clinical welcome text with four required phrases: 'Welcome to Hillside Family Medicine', 'We are honored that you have chosen us', 'dedicated to providing comprehensive, compassionate care', and 'access our patient portal'. All metadata claims have been verified to match the template content in task.json. The environment uses realistic medical software with synthetic patient data from Synthea.
